about.name: Dr. Hans Ruiz
about.description:
Hi there, I am Dr. Hans Ruiz Serna, I have experience in the management of sciatic, lumbar, and cervical pain using minimally invasive techniques, as well as in surgical procedures for joint prosthetics and spinal surgery.
Since 2014, I have dedicated myself to performing fracture repair surgeries, joint replacements, and comprehensive management of musculoskeletal injuries, offering precise, humane medical care focused on restoring my patients' mobility and quality of life.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Dr. Hans Ruiz, located in Tijuana, Baja California, Mexico, is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the information you provide through our website

section1.title: 1. Information we collect
section1.text: We collect personal information such as your name, email address, and phone number when you fill out our contact or appointment forms.

section2.title: 2. How we use your information
items: To schedule medical appointments or consultations.
To communicate regarding medical services and procedures.
To provide information requested by you.

section3.title: 3. Data protection
section3.text: We implement administrative, physical, and technical safeguards to ensure your data is protected against unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse.

section4.title: 4. Data sharing
section4.text: We do not sell, rent, or share your information with third parties, except when required by law.

section5.title: 5. Your rights
section5.text1: You may request to access, update, or delete your personal data by contacting us at

section6.title: 6. International users
section6.text: By using this website, you understand that your information may be transferred to and processed in Mexico where our clinic is located.

section7.title: 7. Updates
section7.text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be reflected on this page with the updated date below.
